title: Spicy Tofu Scrambled Potato Crumble
description: This low-carb German dish features a crowd-pleasing combination of spicy tofu and tender potato crumbles with tahini for a nutritious twist.

ingredients.name: 1 cup cubed firm tofu
ingredients.notes: Use silken tofu if you prefer a smoother texture.

ingredients.name: 2 medium potatoes, peeled and diced
ingredients.notes: Ensure they are of similar size for even cooking.

ingredients.name: 1/4 cup tahini
ingredients.notes: Use a mild variety like Lemon or Garlic Tahini.

ingredients.name: Salt and black pepper, to taste

instructions: Boil potatoes in salted water until tender (about 20 minutes). Drain well.
In a pan, lightly sauté minced garlic with cayenne pepper and salt for about 30 seconds.
Add cubed tofu to the pan. Cook over medium heat, stirring occasionally, until heated through and slightly golden, about 5 minutes.
Add drained potatoes back into the pan along with lemon juice. Stir in tahini and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes or until desired consistency is reached.
Serve hot as a breakfast dish with optional toppings like fresh herbs or avocado.
